authorizedStatement: authorize fresh checks, process isolation, C1-C3 arming transition, schema-valid micro-live stub, fresh quote, exactly one 0.005 SOL JUP BUY at the specified pool, and mandatory SELL exit using the confirmed BUY filled token amount.

blocker.reason: The LIVE SELL post-fill partial-fill validation compares the parsed SELL output amount in SOL units against Jupiter's raw lamport minimum-output threshold. A confirmed mandatory SELL can therefore be misclassified as PARTIAL_FILL_UNRECONCILED after broadcast, preventing the local exit path from closing the open live position record. This violates the mandatory-exit requirement for the first-live cycle.
evidence: live_executor.js parseFillFromTransaction sets SELL outputAmount from solDelta in SOL units.
live_executor.js completeLiveSwapFromPipeline sets expectedMinOut from quote.otherAmountThreshold or quote.outAmount, which is a raw Jupiter amount.
live_executor.js completeLiveSwapFromPipeline passes fill.outputAmount into detectPartialFill for both BUY and SELL.
The prior focused mocked full-SELL submission path produced PARTIAL_FILL_UNRECONCILED before the test was narrowed to the pre-submit guard.

codeLocations.observation: SELL outputAmount is derived from solDelta, a SOL-denominated value.
expectedMinOut is derived from Jupiter raw output threshold.
fillOutAmount uses fill.outputAmount for SELL without raw-unit normalization.

nextRequiredStep: Engineering remediation only: normalize SELL partial-fill validation to compare raw output units or skip the raw minimum-output comparison only when the confirmed SELL fill has already been parsed in SOL units with positive output and the route was pre-submit validated. Add a focused full mocked LIVE SELL test proving executeLiveExit closes the position after a confirmed SELL without PARTIAL_FILL_UNRECONCILED, while real partial/invalid SELL fills still fail closed.
